user.title: Remander
user.description: Enter the host or IP of your Remander device. Leave the password blank unless you have enabled HTTP Basic authentication on the device.

discovery_confirm.title: Set up Remander
discovery_confirm.description: Add Remander device {device_id} at {host}? Home Assistant will register a webhook on the device so workflow events (away/home/pause, mode changes, mute) stream into HA in real time.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device.

abort.already_configured: This Remander device is already configured.
abort.not_remander: Discovered device does not look like a Remander.
abort.mismatched_device: Discovered device ID does not match the device's reported ID.

set_mode.name: Set mode
set_mode.description: Switch the Remander device to away or home mode.

pause.name: Pause notifications
pause.description: Pause Remander notifications using the device's default duration.
